final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a TikTok-style product detail page image for an overseas e-commerce listing.

Style/medium: clean e-commerce product showcase, flat-lay and lifestyle hybrid, crisp and elegant presentation
Composition:
  hero product centered — foldable prayer mat unfolded to show classic pattern
  green tassel prayer beads arranged alongside
  silk storage pouch placed nearby, slightly open to hint at contents
  layout feels gift-ready and premium, with clear visual hierarchy
Subject:
  high-quality foldable prayer mat with classic woven pattern, soft texture visible
  matching green tassel misbaha / prayer beads
  elegant silk storage pouch for the full set
  the entire set in a stunning, consistent green color palette
Scene/backdrop: minimal clean background that lets the green set stand out, subtle soft surface
Lighting/mood: soft, even lighting; warm and inviting; conveys luxury gift feel for Ramadan / Eid celebration
Color palette: rich green as dominant color throughout the set, accents of gold or ivory if present on the mat pattern
Materials/textures: soft foldable fabric mat, silky pouch material, tassel beads
Text (verbatim):
  "Premium Foldable Prayer Mat Set"
  "Classic Pattern · Ultra Soft · Portable"
  "Includes: Prayer Mat + Tassel Prayer Beads + Silk Storage Pouch"
  "Perfect Ramadan & Eid Gift for Your Loved Ones"
  "Elegant Green Set — A Thoughtful Gesture They'll Treasure"
Constraints:
  all text must be in accurate English
  product features must be clearly communicated to drive purchase intent
  reference the three provided product photos for accurate color, pattern, and item details
Avoid: cluttered layout, inaccurate colors, missing product components, generic stock-photo feel
